prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京工业大学在京综合类最低录取位次分别为约11319→11702→11858→13610→13897名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约2039名，2024年出现明 显跳升（较2023年后移约1752名），2025年延续小幅后移约287名，2025年基准位次约13897名；该校在京综合类招生计划2021年1622人、2022年1617人、2023年 1817人、2024年1786人、2025年2265人，2026年增至2476人，较2025年扩招约9.3%，扩招幅度明显，对录取位次有下拉作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学 为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第65名，近年排名在59–72之间波动，整体稳定，在京属高校中居首；该校2022年高考周期声誉评价 偏负面（拟录取研究生不当言论事件），2026年周期再次出现类似事件（拟录取研究生因不当言论被取消资格），对学校形象有一定负面影响但程度有限；抖音热度排名第57位， 评价为较热，短视频平台关注度中等。历史投档异常数据中未见该校有明显断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，环境科学与工程获评A，光学工程、土木工程、材料 科学与工程、软件工程获评A-，共5个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业在2024 –2026年专业热度分析中均为高热推荐或推荐级别，与该校工科优势高度契合，有利于维持报考热度；北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增长约29.7%，考 生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；北京工业大学位于北京市，为本省唯一市属211高校，在京招生占比极高（2025年 综合类计划2265人，占该校全国招生主体），本地考生报考意愿强烈，地域偏好因素稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年扩招约9.3%对位次的下拉作用、 以及北京市考生规模大幅增长约29.7%带来的竞争加剧效应，扩招与考生增长相互对冲后竞争仍趋激烈；结合学校声誉偏负面但影响有限、工科优势与热门专业契合度高等因素， 预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准13897名基础上继续后移，预测最低位次约14704名，区间14204–15204名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约14704名，区间14204–15204名。建议位次在14200名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（计算机、电子信息类实验班）；位次在14200–15200名之间的考生以二档中 等难度专业为主力选择，兼顾一档边缘专业；位次在15200名之后的考生应以三档专业保底，优先考虑土木类、材料类等学科评估A-专业，同时关注能源动力等热度上升专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing University of Technology's comprehensive category in Beijing were approximately 11319 → 11702 → 11858 → 13610 → 13897, showing a continuous backward trend overall. In the past three years, the cumulative backward shift was about 2039 places, with a significant jump in 2024 (a backward shift of about 1752 places compared to 2023), and a slight backward shift of about 287 places in 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 13897. The university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Beijing was 1622 in 2021, 1617 in 2022, 1817 in 2023, 1786 in 2024, and 2265 in 2025. In 2026, it will increase to 2476, an expansion of about 9.3% compared to 2025, which is significant and has a downward pull on admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 65th, with fluctuations between 59 and 72 in recent years, overall stable, and ranks first among Beijing-affiliated universities. In the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to an incident involving inappropriate remarks by a prospective graduate student). In the 2026 cycle, a similar incident occurred again (a prospective graduate student had their admission canceled due to inappropriate remarks), which had a certain negative impact on the school's image but to a limited extent. Douyin popularity ranks 57th, evaluated as relatively hot, with moderate attention on short video platforms. Historical admission anomaly data shows no significant gaps for this university. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Environmental Science and Engineering received an A rating, while Optical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering received A- ratings, totaling five disciplines at A- or above. The engineering strength is outstanding, attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all rated as high-heat or recommended in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, highly consistent with the university's engineering advantages, helping to maintain application heat. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam registrants in Beijing is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Beijing University of Technology is located in Beijing, the only municipal 211 university in the province, with a very high proportion of enrollment in Beijing (in 2025, the comprehensive plan was 2,265, accounting for the majority of the university's national enrollment). Local candidates have a strong willingness to apply, and regional preference factors are stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the downward pull of the approximately 9.3% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition due to the significant increase of about 29.7% in the number of Beijing candidates, the expansion and candidate growth offset each other but competition remains fierce. Combined with the slightly negative but limited impact on reputation, the strong engineering advantages and high alignment with popular majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 13,897. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14,704, with a range of 14,204–15,204.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 14,704, range 14,204–15,204. Candidates with rankings within 14,200 are advised to focus on Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information Experimental Classes); candidates with rankings between 14,200 and 15,200 should primarily choose Tier 2 medium-difficulty majors, while also considering borderline Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings above 15,200 should use Tier 3 majors as safety options, prioritizing Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and other A- rated disciplines, while also paying attention to rising majors like Energy and Power Engineering.
